perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action video. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a white vest over a blue top and a black beret, is standing in a Costco freezer aisle. She excitedly points at a shelf of pizzas and smiles broadly. (2) Close-ups of the pizza boxes inside the refrigerated display cases. The woman picks up a box, presenting it to the camera with an enthusiastic expression. (3) The scene transitions to an indoor apartment setting. Two young women are sitting at a dining table. One wears a black vest and white top, and the other wears a blue turtleneck. They hold slices of a rectangular pizza topped with minced meat, basil, and cherry tomatoes. (4) Detailed close-ups of the pizza slices, emphasizing the height of the toppings and the texture of the crust. (5) The women take bites of the pizza, look at each other with wide eyes, and give double thumbs-up gestures while nodding and smiling.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM begins immediately. A female voice speaks in an excited, high-pitched tone in Chinese. Faint background hum of a large retail warehouse is audible. (2) Occasional 'shing' and 'pop' sound effects are heard, synchronized with text appearances on screen. (3) The vocal performance remains continuous and energetic throughout the transition to the home setting. (4) Sounds of light chewing and paper rustling are mixed into the dialogue during the tasting segment. (5) The music continues at a steady volume until a sharp cut-off at the end of the video.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo; '味道超炸裂!' (Flavor is explosive!) in yellow and red bubble text; '泰式打拋豬風味披薩' (Thai Basil Pork Flavor Pizza) in large bold blue and white characters. (2) Functional Text: White subtitles tracking the spoken Chinese dialogue appear at the bottom center. (3) Functional Text: '$ 249' appears on screen. (4) Decorative Text: '十分 非常值得買' (10 points, very worth buying) with starburst effects. (5) Decorative Text: '味道超乎預期' (Flavor exceeds expectations) in light blue bubbles.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at retail store -> Product Close-up -> Review and tasting at home

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators shown throughout the video
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman with long dark hair, a black beret, and a white puffer vest; another woman with dark hair and a teal blue turtleneck sweater.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene shows commercial refrigerated shelving in a warehouse store. Second scene shows a modern home interior with a dining table, chairs, and household decorations.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an enthusiastic food review of a specific new Costco product (Thai Basil Pork Pizza). It utilizes high-energy visuals, rapid editing, and positive vocal reinforcement to convince the audience of the product's high quality and value, ultimately encouraging them to purchase it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed product showcasing, price display, and strong verbal recommendation

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Heavy use of variety-show style on-screen text and high-energy narration typical of Taiwanese food influencers.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets Costco shoppers and food enthusiasts, emphasizing cost-performance ratio and flavor novelty.
